nasb.text: Then he hastily took the bandage away from his eyes, and the king of Israel recognized him that he was of the prophets.

esv.text: Then he hurried to take the bandage away from his eyes, and the king of Israel recognized him as one of the prophets.

cnv.text: 他急忙把蒙在眼上的頭巾除下，以色列王就認出他是一個先知。

ccb.text: 先知立刻拿去蒙眼的头巾，以色列王认出他是个先知。
